edges.description: Sustained MAPK-driven tumor-cell growth and survival is the core oncogenic mechanism producing BRAF V600E-mutant NSCLC.
BRAF V600E-mutant NSCLC most often occurs in adenocarcinoma histology, consistent with the proliferative lung epithelial tumor program.
intermediate_mechanisms: malignant transformation of lung epithelial cells

edges.description: Proliferating NSCLC can disseminate hematogenously, and metastatic spread to the brain is a recognized complication of NSCLC.

nodes.description: The BRAF V600E mutation substitutes glutamic acid for valine at codon 600 in the activation segment. This mimics phosphorylation, causing constitutive kinase activation. V600E signals as a monomer independent of upstream RAS, unlike wild-type BRAF which requires RAS-mediated dimerization.

evidence.reference_title: [A Case of Metastatic Non-small Cell Lung Cancer with Rare BRAF p.L485_T488delinsF Mutation Treated with Dabrafenib and Trametinib].
evidence.snippet: The incidence of BRAF mutations in non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) patients ranges from 1.5% to 5.5%, with BRAF V600 mutations accounting for approximately 30%-50% of all BRAF mutations, among which BRAF V600E represents the most prevalent mutation type.

nodes.description: Brain metastases occur in BRAF V600E NSCLC. Dabrafenib plus trametinib has demonstrated intracranial activity.

evidence.reference_title: CXCR4/CXCL12 in non-small-cell lung cancer metastasis to the brain.
evidence.snippet: Synchronous or metachronous brain metastasis occur in approximately 33% of NSCLC patients [35].

nodes.description: Constitutive ERK signaling drives expression of cyclin D1 and other cell cycle genes, promoting uncontrolled proliferation. ERK also inhibits pro-apoptotic proteins through phosphorylation.

BRAF V600E constitutively phosphorylates and activates MEK1/2, which in turn phosphorylates and activates ERK1/2. This leads to uncontrolled proliferation and survival signaling. The lack of dependence on upstream RAS makes the tumor exquisitely sensitive to BRAF inhibition.
BRAF V600E NSCLC is predominantly adenocarcinoma histology. May have micropapillary or lepidic patterns.

evidence.reference_title: Selection Strategies and Practical Application of BRAF V600E-Mutated Non-Small Cell Lung Carcinoma.
evidence.snippet: Nineteen cases were adenocarcinomas without EGFR and ALK alterations.

nodes.description: BRAF V600E-mutant NSCLC is a molecularly defined lung neoplasm driven by constitutive MAPK signaling.

evidence.reference_title: BRAFV600E-mutant metastatic NSCLC: disease overview and treatment landscape
evidence.snippet: In this review, we cover the current understanding of BRAF mutations and associated clinical characteristics in patients with metastatic NSCLC, approved and emerging treatment options, BRAF sequencing approaches, and unmet needs.
